title: Business Breakfast | Stock/Share Market News | 18th June 2026 | TV5 Money

recommendations.note: Narrow 125-145 band at ~6.5 PE; needs patience, should rally and cross 160 again.
recommendations.detail: corrected from 160 to ~135, narrow 125–145 band (like most PSU banks); at ~6.5 PE. Hold, needs patience; should rally and cross 160 again.

recommendations.note: Hold long-term; given as idea ~220, now ~200; expect volatility, don't panic.
